description: Color photograph with no on-image text or graphic overlays, of a man at work. He wears dark navy coveralls with yellow and lime reflective hi-vis stripes, heavy welding gloves, and a camouflage-patterned welding helmet, and leans over a steel work table cutting metal with an oxy-fuel cutting torch; a shower of orange sparks sprays downward from the cut. The setting is a metal fabrication shop with a cinder-block wall, hand tools, gears, and equipment hanging in the background. The tweet text reads 'The skilled trades go so hard'. The image carries no text, slogans, or agency seals.
